creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #13)

Just noticed:

> Partially implement memfd_create() via mkostemp()

We have shm_open(SHM_ANON) for that! memfd is literally SHM_ANON but as a separate syscall because Linux likes making things look complex :)

> ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mako>0:textproc/py-mako

I think 2.7 is required here? (Or was that not Mesa…) The new flavors feature can help with that.
